title: Mushy Egyptian Shoyu-koji Toast
description: A unique one-pot dish blending Egyptian flavors with Japanese shoyu-koji, served with crispy toast.

ingredients.name: Shoyu-koji
ingredients.notes: Japanese fermented soybean paste with rice koji.

instructions: In a non-stick saucepan, combine eggs, shoyu-koji, and butter. Whisk until well combined.
Heat the saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the mixture thickens and forms a custard-like texture, about 8 minutes.
Add crushed black pepper and salt to taste, then stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for an additional 2 minutes, until the mixture has thickened to your liking.
Meanwhile, toast a slice of crusty bread until lightly browned and crispy.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in chopped fresh cilantro.
Place the toasted bread slice in the saucepan and use a spatula to carefully fold the mixture onto the bread.
